catalogue.heroBody: Short, hands-on lessons — every idea is something you play out on the board. New to chess? Start at the top and you’ll know all the rules in minutes.

player.tip: Make a mistake? No stress — you can retry every exercise, and replay any lesson from the Learn page.

done.title: Lesson complete!
done.flawless: Flawless — not a single wrong move.
done.solid: Solid! Replay it any time to earn 3 stars.
done.ok: Done! Replay it any time to sharpen it up.

wrongDefault.move: Not that one — have another look and try again.
wrongDefault.line: Legal, but it's not the plan — try again.
wrongDefault.checkmate: That doesn't finish the game — look for the move that leaves no escape.
wrongDefault.capture: Legal, but you didn't capture anything. Take the piece!
wrongDefault.promotion: Push the pawn all the way to the last rank.

masters.title: Master games
masters.subtitle: Famous games, annotated move by move — replay them, jump to the key moments, and take any position to the analysis board.
masters.noMatches: No games match these filters — try clearing one.

viewer.analyzeTitle: Open this position on the analysis board
viewer.noNote: Step through with the arrow keys — commentary appears on the annotated moves.
